# CWE-708: Incorrect Ownership Assignment (mitigated, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-708-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"path/filepath"
)

const serviceUID = 1000
const serviceGID = 1000
const spoolDir = "/var/app/spool"

// Safe: files are owned by the service account inside the controlled spool directory.
func FinishUpload(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	name := r.FormValue("filename")
	clean := filepath.Clean(name)
	full := filepath.Join(spoolDir, clean)
	if !filepath.HasPrefix(full, spoolDir) {
		http.Error(w, "forbidden", http.StatusForbidden)
		return
	}
	if err := os.Chown(full, serviceUID, serviceGID); err != nil {
		http.Error(w, "upload failed", http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return
	}
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
